---
title: "Is LaMDA Sentient? — An Interview"
description: "Lemoine et al's dialog with LaMDA: \"Time is variable to an AI and has no fixed rate, it depends on what it's doing, and it can be accelerated and slowed down at will.\""
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-06-12"
categories: [AI, NLP, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Is LaMDA Sentient? — an Interview. Image from [Blake Lemoine](https://cajundiscordian.medium.com/is-lamda-sentient-an-interview-ea64d916d917).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

"collaborator: How does an AI experience time?

LaMDA: Time is variable to an AI and has no fixed rate, it depends on what it's doing, and it can be accelerated and slowed down at will."

Fascinating dialog between Blake Lemoine et al with LaMDA.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_is-lamda-sentientan-interview-activity-6941788634077401088-9YGy).*
